title: Substrate delivery — server → recipient frames
description: Versioned envelope for the interservice communication substrate (CLOACI-S-0012). JSON text frames; payloads are base64-encoded bytes. Delivery is at-least-once: recipients must be idempotent on `id`.

oneOf.title: welcome
oneOf.description: Sent first on every new connection. Echoes the negotiated protocol version and (advisory) the highest row id known at connect time.

oneOf.title: push
oneOf.description: A delivery-outbox row addressed to this recipient. `payload_b64` is the base64-encoded raw payload bytes; the inner format is producer-defined per `kind` (execution events use JSON).

id.description: Outbox row id — ack with this value; dedup on it across reconnects
